SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO FURTHER RESPOND TO DEFENDANT QIANG WUS SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER ATTORNEYS (TRANSACTION ID # 62950358) FILED BY DEFENDANT WU, QIANG TONG, YOUNGWEN WU, TONG

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS QIANG WU, YOUNGWEN TONG, TONG WU'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO FURTHER RESPOND TO DEFENDANT QTANG WUS SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER ATTORNEYS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. WITHIN TEN DAYS, PLAINTIFF SHALL AMEND HER RESPONSES TO EITHER SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 53 AND/OR REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 36 IN ORDER TO PROVIDE A CONSISTENT RESPONSE AS TO WHETHER OR NOT THERE WAS FIRE DAMAGE TO THE PREMISES. A FURTHER RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY IS NOT REQUIRED SINCE THE INTERROGATORY IS IRRELEVANT TO DETERMINING OR ESTIMATING ATTORNEYS' FEES. NO SANCTIONS. PROPOSED ORDER PRESENTED TO JPT ELECTRONICALLY AND PENDING ORIGINAL SIGNATURE FOR FILING. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOMAS COHEN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-26-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Further Respond To Defendant Qtang Wus Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorneys
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shannon E. Mallory, Esq., Demler, Armstrong & Rowland, LLP, Telephone 415-949-1900, appearing for Defendant(s) QIANG WU, YOUNGWEN TONG, TONG WU;

No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS QIANG WU, YOUNGWEN TONG, TONG WU'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Further Respond To Defendant Qtang Wus Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorneys

The Motion is granted in part and denied in part. Within ten days, Plaintiff shall amend her responses to either Special Interrogatory No. 53 and/or Request for Production No. 36 in order to provide a consistent response as to whether or not there was fire damage to the premises. A further response to Special Interrogatory is not required since the Interrogatory is irrelevant to determining or estimating attorneys' fees.

No sanctions.

Proposed order presented to JPT electronically and pending original signature for filing.

Judge Pro Tem: Tomas Cohen; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-17-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Off Calendar
